name: Refuse Refuse SF
description: A citizen-led trash cleanup campaign organizing block cleanups and community sweeps all over SF.

name: Friends of the Urban Forest
description: Helping communities plant and care for street trees and sidewalk gardens to green their neighborhoods.

name: SF Parks Alliance
description: A city-wide organization partnering with local groups to build, improve, and advocate for neighborhood parks.

name: Civic Joy Fund
description: Funding projects that bring artistic, musical, and economic vibrant color to San Francisco's neighborhoods.

name: Tenderloin People's Congress
description: A coalition of Tenderloin residents, activists, and service providers promoting civic engagement and safety.

name: Mission Cultural Center
description: Serving the community with multicultural arts education, performances, and public art gallery space.

name: Manny's Community Space
description: A civic gathering space and cafe that hosts local discussions, political meetups, and neighborhood talks.

name: SF Civic Tech
description: A volunteer group building open-source tech projects to improve local government services and civic life in SF.

name: Community Spaces SF
description: A non-profit securing empty retail locations to create free neighborhood sharing and art hubs.
